author: st3v3nmw
description: Fight the forgetting curve by reviewing flashcards & entire notes.

manifest.author: Stephen Mwangi
manifest.description: Fight the forgetting curve by reviewing flashcards & entire notes using spaced repetition. Organize your flashcards into decks and learn only the cards you need to recall.
manifest.name: Spaced Repetition

name: Spaced Repetition

releases.description:
## v1.15.4 of the Spaced Repetition plugin is out!  :rocket: 🗂️ 

Fixed 🛠️

- Fixed that the card isnt redrawn right after edits
- Fixed odd ribbon icon behavior
- Fixed reversal of cards if one edited a reversed card
- Fixed that the bury cards feature was broken


## New PRs

- fix: fixes that the card isnt redrawn after edits, fixed odd ribbon icon behavior, fixed reversal of cards, [`#1577`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1577)
- fix: Preserve FSRS sibling schedule placeholders [`#1575`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1575)
- chore(deps-dev): bump esbuild from 0.28.0 to 0.28.1 [`#1576`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1576)

releases.description:
## v1.15.3 of the Spaced Repetition plugin is out!  :rocket: 🗂️ 

Added :white_check_mark: 

- Added a info text to the decks list if one didn't create any cards just yet to make the onboarding experience better

Fixed 🛠️

- Fixed that the settings page would sometimes show that it needs more time to load, but then it just doesnt change after waiting
- Fixed again a lot of type issues


## New PRs

- feat: improved deck list info when decks are empty [`#1564`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1564)
- fix: Fixed that the settings page was showing & fixed again a lot of type issues [`#1562`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1562)
- chore(deps): bump the npm group with 11 updates [`#1559`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1559)

releases.description:
## v1.15.2 of the Spaced Repetition plugin is out!  :rocket: 🗂️ 

Added :white_check_mark: 

- Added a reminder system, which reminds the user via notifications to review cards and auto opens the flashcard review view (as an opt-in feature)


Fixed 🛠️

- Fixed that the plugin crashes if one leaves a sr tab open, closes obsidian and then reopens obsidian 🫤


## New PRs

- feat: auto-open review sessions for ready flashcards [#1513](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1513)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## v1.15.1 of the Spaced Repetition plugin is out!  :rocket: 🗂️ 

Added :white_check_mark: 

- Added a setting to overwrite the default language, as it can be useful, when a language is only half translated in the plugin
- Added a help text which is shown when no notes are marked for review


Fixed 🛠️

- Fixed a bug, where the plugin would use a ton of resources when used together with the settings search plugin
- Fixed some more type issues
- Fixed a security vulnerability which was introduced by having postcss as a dependency


## New PRs

- fix: Fix bugs of last refactor & implementing a language setting [`#1551`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1551)
- fix: Fixed that the fsrs algorithm wasnt mentioned in the read me [`#1545`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1545)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## v1.15.0 of the Spaced Repetition plugin is out!  :rocket: 🗂️ 

Hi, so this one is again a big update😊 . As much requested;
the FSRS scheduling algorithm is finally available. It wont be enabled by default, as it isn't in use for long and there might be some bugs hiding there. You can find it on the scheduling page in the settings.

I've also added a way to hide away the scheduling comment, as I found it quite necessary with all the new parameters in it. So basically there is a sr specific callout type (!sr|card-metadata) that can have the scheduling comment in it and then it just renders it as an empty line. 
It is of course also a opt in option to use it. You can find all the options for it on the data page in the settings.

Added :white_check_mark: 

- Enabled FSRS algorithm
- Implemented a sr metadata callout which hides its contents
- Added a hot key to jump to a card ("j" by default)


Fixed 🛠️

- Fixed a boat load of type errors
- Refactored code into a data part and a scheduling part for a better dev experience
- Added eslint warnings to stop bad type usage and to improve all the still persisting type errors over time


## New PRs

- feat: jump hotkey [`#1543`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1543)
- fix: bug hunt [`#1542`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1542)
- feat: Implemented a callou to hide away the sr comment [`#1539`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1539)
- feat: store scheduling data in plugin data instead of inline in notes [`#1471`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1471)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## v1.14.3 of the Spaced Repetition plugin is out!  :rocket: 🗂️ 

Hi, again a small release here😊. This release addresses risks & warnings from the scorecard on the obsidian community page.
All risks should be fixed now and in theory cant crop up again, as I added some eslint errors which warn any dev to not use bad practices.
I also addressed a few warnings and added build verification to our release workflow.

The rest of the issues will be addressed in several refactor PRs in the future😇. 

## New PRs

- fix: Fixed more community issues [`#1532`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1532)
- fix: Fix obsidian comunity issues [`#1521`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1521)
- fix: Fixed a few small bugs that have accumulated [`#1514`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1514)
- chore: bump version to v1.14.2 [`8dadace`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/commit/8dadaceb12e1f3a08830153c88504b2c21259811)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## v1.14.2 of the Spaced Repetition plugin is out!  :rocket: 🗂️ 

Hi, here just a quick patch to fix some bugs😇. 

I'll be releasing more of these kinds of versions, where they just fix some small bugs and which aren't greatly announced anywhere.
This will allow for small low effort releases, which keep the plugin in good shape. This is possible now, as I changed the release workflow to have multiple release lanes, where they can be managed & released individually, without impacting each other😊.

The code for FSRS is already included in this version, because I just now started the aforementioned workflow changes and it was already merged in the main branch. It is disabled and dormant in the current version, as it isn't properly integrated yet. It would definitely be usable, but not as much integrated as I want it to be (perfection is the enemy of good 🤭😅🧑‍🎨).
It will be enabled once the next major release is ready (v1.15.0)😇.

## New features ✅

- One can archive decks by putting deck tags into "tags to ignore". This way one doesn't have to change the tags in the notes it self
- The date format shown in the note review view is now customizable. You can customize it by using the format string from moment (see [here](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/))

## New PRs

- fix: Fixed a few small bugs that have accumulated [`#1514`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1514)
- feat: Adds a setting for the date format used in the note review queue [`#1497`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1497)
- feat: add FSRS scheduling for flashcards [`#1425`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1425)
- feat: add "tags to ignore" for flashcards and notes [`#1486`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1486)
- chore(deps-dev): bump the npm group with 9 updates [`#1488`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1488)
- chore(deps): bump pnpm/action-setup from 5 to 6 in the github-actions group [`#1489`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1489)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## v1.14.0 of the Spaced Repetition plugin is out!  :rocket: 🗂️ 

Hi, so this one is a big update this time :grin: . As much requested;
I finally fixed that links weren't working properly. The ui got a big overhaul and 
we are oh so closer to implementing the FSRS algorithm and saving the card/note schedule data in a separate file, with 2 new PRs.

The last two mentioned features should be coming in the next-ish release, 
as I still want to test them thoroughly and maybe integrate them better :innocent:.

Added :white_check_mark: 

- Added a dropdown in the deck list to change the review mode right then and there
- Added an option to customize the hotkeys for the rating buttons
- Added an option to close the modal when jumping to a note
- Added two delete schedule buttons in the note file menu (has to be enabled)
- Added a delete schedule button in the note review panel (has to be enabled)
- Added a delete card button (has to be enabled)
- Added a reset all settings button

Updated :recycle: 

- Redesigned UI :art:, to be easier to expand for future features & to further more improve mobile UX
- Improved README to show more of the plugin via pictures

Fixed 🛠️

- Finally fixed links & embedded media within cards :partying_face:
- Fixed that the deck wasn't reviewable in cram mode, after reviewing it once
- Fixed that the rating button colors weren't accessible enough
- Fixed a bug with the burry list, which made a lot of cards not show up
- Fixed incorrect description for the delete schedule option
- Fixed keyboard navigation for cloze cards
- Fixed that long math formulas were cut off in cards


## New PRs


- feat: Better landing page & fixed some bug in the deck info [`#1473`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1473)
- fix: fixed that links in cards weren't working properly & fixed that not all decks at once were reviewable [`#1472`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1472)
- fix: Fix small UI bugs & implementing a delete schedule option in the file menu of notes [`#1470`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1470)
- fix: close modal on jump [`#1432`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1432)
- feat: Integrated delete button pr [`#1468`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1468)

- feat: complete ui overhaul [`#1466`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1466)
- fix: improve keyboard navigation for cloze cards [`#1458`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1458)
- fix: fix "Jump to cart" feature [`#1462`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1462)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## v1.13.9 of the Spaced Repetition plugin is out!  :rocket: 🗂️ 

Added :white_check_mark: 

- Added an again button for same day review 
    -> *It is basically a hard button, which always schedules the card for the same day*
- Added a development news section on the github discussions page 
    -> *The aim here is to keep the community updated and to allow for better transparency when it comes* to the development of this plugin
- Added postcss for a better development experience 
    -> *Allows for more decentralized css files, but it will generate one big styles.css again*

Updated :recycle: 

- Separated delete schedule buttons into 3 more granular delete buttons 
    -> *Allows to delete card schedules separately from note schedules*
- Updated roadmap
- Improved the documentation website (only visually so far :sweat_smile: )
- Improved the locale system so that it is easier to add new text 

Fixed 🛠️

- Fixed that the open cards in note command was broken

## New PRs

- feat: better delete schedule settings section [`#1418`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1418)
- feat: Added an again button for same day review & adjusted some small visual things [`#1417`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1417)
- fix: Fixed that opening cards in a note lead to the plugin crashing sometimes [`#1416`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1416)
- feat: Improved docs & readme [`#1412`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1412)
- feat: Added postcss to improve ui development [`#1411`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1411)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release:
- fixes the recent performance issues we've had with the plugin
- introduces custom cloze patterns 🥳 all thanks to @MotaOcimar's work ([documentation](https://www.stephenmwangi.com/obsidian-spaced-repetition/flashcards/cloze-cards/#cloze-types))

I've tested the release but not as extensively as I normally would. Perhaps we need a beta version of the plugin? That being said, I'm on standby to fix bugs ASAP. Just give me (@st3v3nmw) a shout.

-   docs: document custom cloze patterns [`#1118`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1118)
-   refactor: parser & cloze patterns [`#1117`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1117)
-   fix(ui): render markdown content for questions in nested lists [`#1114`](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/pull/1114)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug Fixes:
- Fix extra note review panes being added (@AB1908)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Hey y'all, version 1.9.0 is out 🥳!
Many thanks to everyone who contributed!

Functionality: 
- Card backwards navigation (@FelixGibson)
- Add curly brackets as option for cloze fields (@lachlancollins)

Bug Fixes:
- Replace crlf to lf on card parse (@jasonho1308)
- Fix card back button UI/UX

QoL Improvements:
- Added new setting to collapse/expand subdecks  (@MostlyArmless)
- Set the flashcard's font size as user editor (@edvardchen)
- Make the note review pane optional (@AB1908)

Translations:
- Add Brazilian Portuguese Translation (@Helaxious)
- Update Simplified Chinese Translation (@zyl-lizi)
- Add Traditional Chinese Translation (@emisjerry)

House Keeping:
- Update dependencies
- Revert to npm over yarn

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Hello y'all 👋🏾. Here's a release that has been long overdue.
Many thanks to everyone who contributed!

Functionality:
- Add "ogg" as supported audio file format (@sabarrett)
- Add customizable review buttons (@AB1908)

Bug Fixes:
- Fix side pane breakage with Obisidian v0.15.4 (@AB1908)
- Handle code fences better (@zcysxy)

QoL Improvements:
- Add yarn lockfile (@olingern)
- Add & automate running Prettier (@olingern)

Translations:
- Translation to Korean/한국어 (@ksundong)
- Update Simplified Chinese translations (@11-check-it-out)
- Fixed mistakes in Russian translation (@ytatichno)
- Check that localization entries are consistent across all files

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug Fixes:

- Fix textInterval calculations
- Fix tag override

Translations:

- To Simplified Chinese/简体中文 (@watergua)
- To Czech/čeština (@martinrakovec)
- To Russian/русский (@ytatichno)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug Fixes:

- Fix overriding tags when tags are used as separators for multiline cards
- Use more accurate calculations when converting intervals to text

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Hello y'all 👋🏾. Here's a release that has been long overdue.
Many thanks to everyone who contributed!

Functionality:
- Support for audio & video in flashcards (@careilly)
- Support note transclusion in flashcards (@joelmeyerhamme)
- Cramming flashcards (@EthanHarv)

Bug Fixes:
- Fix YAMLParse bug in statistics
- Fix first time random card selection
- HTML comments from other plugins cause the creation of some cards to be left out (@andrewcrook)
- Correct notes(s) to note(s) in en.ts lang file (@Trikzon)
- Change Eases x-axis from DAYS to EASES (@asdia0)

QoL Improvements:
- Filter statistics by date range
- Fix collapsed/expanded states when redrawing the sidebar (@erichalldev)
- Zoom on image on click (@rgruenewald)
- Changing interpolate to an optional arg of t (@LouisStAmour)

Translations:
- To German/Deutsch (@GollyTicker)
- To Japanese/日本語 (@yo-goto)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Functionality:
- Optional `**bolded text**` to clozes conversion
- Statistics on intervals, eases, & card types
- Command to review flashcards from one note only

Bug Fixes:
- Fix bug where notes in 'New' were not included in review queue (multiple review queues)
- Roll back caching to fix stale cached data, & reduce overhead required to keep it up to date

QoL Improvements:
- New Icon (thanks to @TfTHacker)
- "Open File" link in flashcards review now opens the notes in the background for later edit (thanks to @TfTHacker)
- Better calculation of initial ease for flashcards

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Functionality:
- Multiple note review queues (thanks to @erichalldev)
- Ability to hide some folders from the plugin (thanks to @aviskase)

Bug Fixes:
- Override saving on same line if flashcard ends with codeblock
- Refresh stats before loading statistics modal

QoL Improvements:
- Add option to clear cache

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Functionality:

- Single-line reversed cards (`front::back` & `back:::front` cards are added)
- Multi-line reversed cards (`front??back` & `back??front` cards are added)
- Ability to ignore flashcards for a while by wrapping them in HTML comments

Bug Fixes:
- Blank lines in code blocks are now supported
- Fixed saving of some settings options

QoL improvements:
- Caching of scheduling information (should drastically reduce processing time)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug Fixes:
- Remove folder expansion icon for decks without child decks
- Parsing of cloze cards no longer requires a newline
- Fix statistics modal (accumulate overdue cards, linearity)
- Only have the SRS review context menu only on markdown files (not folders, PDFs, etc as before)

QoL improvements:
- Scroll to flashcard location after clicking "Open File" link
- Customizable height & width of flashcard modal (thanks to @rubbish)
- Add multilingual support
- Code quality improvements (refactors, types, stricter checks when building)
- Burying all cards in a note after reviewing it

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug fixes:
- Properly handle nonexistent images during rendering
- Include card in only one deck (for those who use tags)

QoL improvements:
- Ability to randomize cards order
- Resize images to fit to modal size or to match the user specified size
- Per deck total number of cards

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug Fixes:
- Fix burying of new cards

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Functionality:
- Adds a `View statistics` command to show a bar graph of the flashcard reviews due in the future

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug fixes:
- Fix load scheduler bug

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
QoL improvements:
- Not run more than one instance of the flashcards & notes sync functions
- Overall deck counts

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug fixes:
- Fix traversal of subdecks & their siblings
- CSS fix for light themes
- Show folders based on the presence of flashcards inside of them instead of files. #136

QoL improvements:
- Burying works till the next day

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug fixes:
- Fix deck counts going into negatives when burying related cards

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Functionality:
- Nested decks (using Obsidian’s hierarchical tags or folder structure)

Bug fixes:
- Better support for images sourced directly from the web

QoL improvements:
- Load balancing which helps maintain a consistent number of reviews from one day to another
- Boosting cards that are recalled correctly after long periods of no study

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug fixes:
1. Reviewing flashcard changes format of the text (removes one $ from $$) #101
2. Fix reset flashcard progress NaN bug #104

QoL improvements:
1. Use `Space` to review flashcards as `Good`
2. Settings: split tags with newlines and spaces (raised in #102)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug fixes:
- #76 (ignore codeblocks while creating flashcards).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug fixes:
- Properly rewrite image links after flashcard review
- Fix review flashcards command

QoL improvements
- Option to remove card context from flashcards view
- Option to disable cloze cards

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug fixes:
- Rewrite cards to file using the correct separator

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Functionality:
- Support for images in flashcards (albeit in a hacky way)
- Maximum interval option

QoL improvements:
- Ability to change the inline & multiline flashcard separators to say `;;` or `!!` (might be useful if you have conflicts with Dataview's inline fields)
- Keyboard hotkey to review flashcards
- Limit on number of days to display on right panel
- Options to reset settings to their default values
- Use sliders for settings with a fixed range
- Plugin waits for sometime before attempting to validate and save a setting

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
QoL Improvements:
- UI/UX fixes for Obsidian mobile.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Functionality:
- Flashcard decks - Use tags to create decks for your flashcards (#30)

Bug fixes:
- Make the flashcard view scrollable for large flashcards (#46)
- Fix problem with horizontal rules & YAML (#48)

QoL improvements:
- Change date to the more standard YYYY-MM-DD format (#53 )

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release provides a setting to remove review options from the file menu. If they're cluttering up your interface.
If you disable them, you can use the command hotkeys.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Minor update, fix broken link in settings.

See [1.4.0](https://github.com/st3v3nmw/obsidian-spaced-repetition/releases/tag/1.4.0).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release:
1. Adds support for cloze deletion cards 🎉 
2. Provides a way to reset a card's scheduling progress
3. Changes dates to the more compact `DD-MM-YYYY` date format
4. Cleans up the settings interface
5. Makes the right sidebar detach properly on unload

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release:
1. adds support for tags in YAML #28 
2. provides a setting to have the scheduling-info-HTML-comment in the same line as a single-line card.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Allow for both kinds of review in the same file

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release adds support for flashcards :tada:.

Card types:
1. Single line (`::` separator) i.e. 
```markdown
the question goes on this side::answer goes here!
```
2. Multiline (`?` separator) i.e.
```
As per the definition
of "multiline" the prompt
can be on multiple lines
?
same goes for
the answer
```

It also differentiates between `Easy` and `Good` using the `Easy Bonus` (currently set to `130%`).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release adds a review state `Good` which acts as an in-between state (`Easy`, `Good`, `Hard`).
Reviewing a note as `Good` doesn't change its ease. The interval is changed to `old_interval * old_ease / 100`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: This release provides commands for making review responses. You can create custom hotkeys for them in `Settings -> HotKeys`. This allows for much faster review.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Reviewing files has changed from opt-out to the more reasonable opt-in scheme. This caters for people with hundreds of notes or folders of archived notes. Now you need to tag the notes that you'd like to review (use `#review` by default).
The `sr-review` YAML attribute is now obsolete and should be deleted from the YAML headers that it appears in (previously ignored notes).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Adds a mechanism to allow reviewing of notes with certain tags. Should be useful for those with hundreds of notes.
Issue raised here: #10
This is available in settings.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Fix to YAML namespace due to issue raised here: #7

If you had versions 1.1.1 and lower installed, please fix any scheduled/ignored notes by changing the YAML attributes from:

1. `due` to `sr-due`
2. `interval` to `sr-interval`
3. `ease` to `sr-ease`
4. `review: false` to `sr-review: false`

Otherwise, the plugin should work as expected.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
More fixes to make the plugin more compliant to Obsidian's API.
Fixed failing right pane redraw.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added file context menu.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixes to make the plugin more compliant to Obsidian's API.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Features:
1. Reviewing notes
2. Scheduling notes
3. Ignoring some notes
4. Note importance calculation using PageRank (for initial ease calculation & review queues)
